title: GOOD: exact-value note assertion in receive-side verification
description: After asserting spendable_notes is non-empty, the test also checks that at least one note has value_zatoshi == PAYMENT_AMOUNT_ZATOSHI (not >=). This rules out a false positive where a pre-existing note in the DB happened to satisfy the balance check. The exact-value check proves the specific payment was stored and decrypted correctly, not just that some note exists.
